task_completion.description: The agent imports the three raw audio components (intro, episode_raw, outro).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the files intro.wav, episode_raw.wav, and outro.wav opened in an audio editor (e.g., Audacity) or referenced in a terminal command.

task_completion.description: The agent arranges the audio files sequentially: intro, then episode, then outro.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audio editor timeline shows the three clips aligned end-to-end in the correct order, or a command-line tool is used with concatenation arguments in the correct sequence.

task_completion.description: The agent exports the concatenated audio as a lossless master WAV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or command showing the file being saved as a WAV (44.1kHz, stereo, 16-bit) to /home/ga/Music/podcast_output/.

task_completion.description: The agent exports the concatenated audio as a distribution MP3 file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or command showing the file being saved as an MP3 (192kbps) to /home/ga/Music/podcast_output/.

task_completion.description: The agent embeds the required ID3 metadata into the MP3 file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A metadata editor window (e.g., in Audacity) or command-line flags showing Title='Episode 47: Market Analysis', Artist='The Finance Hour', Album='Season 3', Track=47.

task_completion.description: The agent exports a 15-second highlight clip starting at the 20-second mark of the raw episode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audio editor shows a ~15-second selection being exported, or a command-line tool is used to extract a 15-second segment, saved to /home/ga/Music/podcast_output/.

integrity.description: The agent used genuine audio processing software (like Audacity or ffmpeg) to create the outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual interaction with audio editing software or valid execution of audio processing commands, rather than just renaming files or creating empty files.

integrity.description: The agent entered the metadata into the software's metadata fields or command arguments.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata is seen being typed into an actual ID3 tag editor or passed as valid arguments to an audio processing tool, not just written in a text file.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the files to the requested output directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialogs or terminal commands explicitly show the destination path as /home/ga/Music/podcast_output/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The master and distribution copies should be approximately 70 seconds long. The highlight clip should be approximately 15 seconds long. The ID3 metadata must exactly match: Title='Episode 47: Market Analysis', Artist='The Finance Hour', Album='Season 3', Track=47. The master must be a 16-bit WAV file at 44.1kHz stereo, and the distribution copy must be a 192kbps MP3.
